info.description: A production-ready Go REST API with RBAC, JWT authentication, and permission management
info.title: Go API Base

get.description: List all media files with filtering. Admin access only.

post.description: Trigger cleanup of orphaned media files. Admin access only.

get.description: Get storage statistics for all media files. Admin access only.
List all API keys for the authenticated user with pagination

post.description: Create a new API key with specified scopes for the authenticated user

get.description: Get details of a specific API key by ID

delete.description: Revoke (soft delete) an API key by ID

post.description: Authenticate user and return access/refresh tokens
Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user
Send a password reset email to the user
Reset user password using the token from email
Exchange a valid refresh token for new access and refresh tokens
Create a new user account with email and password

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of email templates

post.description: Create a new email template with name, subject, content, and category

get.description: Retrieve a single email template by its ID

post.description: Queue an email for async delivery

get.description: Get the status of a queued email
List invoices. Regular users see their own invoices, admins see all.

post.description: Create a new invoice

get.description: Get an invoice by ID. Regular users can only see their own invoices.

put.description: Update an invoice. Users can only update their own invoices.

delete.description: Soft delete an invoice. Users can only delete their own invoices.

patch.description: Update the status of an invoice (admin only)

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile information
Get details of a specific media file

patch.description: Update custom properties for a media file

get.description: Download a media file directly
Generate a signed URL for downloading media
List all media files for a specific model instance

post.description: Upload a media file to a specific model instance

get.description: List news articles. Regular users see their own articles, admins see all.

post.description: Create a new news article

get.description: Get a published news article by its slug
Get a news article by ID. Regular users can only see their own articles.

put.description: Update a news article. Users can only update their own articles.

delete.description: Soft delete a news article. Users can only delete their own articles.

patch.description: Update the status of a news article

get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user
Get all notification preferences for the authenticated user

put.description: Create or update a notification preference for the authenticated user

post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read, optionally filtered by type

get.description: Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read

get.description: Retrieve all organizations where the user is a member

post.description: Create a new organization with name and slug

get.description: Retrieve a specific organization by its ID

put.description: Update an organization's name, slug, or settings

delete.description: Soft delete an organization (requires manage permission)

get.description: Retrieve all members of an organization with pagination

post.description: Add a user to an organization with a specific role

delete.description: Remove a user from an organization

get.description: Retrieve a list of all permissions

post.description: Create a new permission with name, resource, action, and optional scope

get.description: Retrieve a list of all roles with their associated permissions

post.description: Create a new role with name and optional description

put.description: Update a role's name and description

delete.description: Soft delete a role (cannot delete system roles)

post.description: Attach a permission to a role

delete.description: Detach a permission from a role

get.description: Retrieve a list of all users

post.description: Create a new user account (admin)

get.description: Retrieve a user by their ID
Get the effective permissions for a user after applying role permissions and deny overrides

post.description: Grant or deny a permission directly to a user

delete.description: Remove a direct permission assignment from a user

get.description: Get all roles assigned to a user

post.description: Assign a role to a user

delete.description: Remove a role from a user

post.description: Process bounce notification from email provider
Process delivery confirmation from email provider

get.description: Check if the server is alive
Check if the server is ready by verifying database and Redis connections

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
